post.summary:
Lists the owners that match the search criteria for a specific Property Management Company, which is specified in the x-homeaway-hasp-api-endsystem and x-homeaway-hasp-api-pmcid headers.
A contains search is performed for each field and any matching results are returned.
If an empty search criteria is specified, then all owners are returned.
The returned owners are sorted alphabetically by last name then first name.

parameters.description: A {HomeAway.DragomanAPI.Contract.PagedSearchSpecification`1} containing the search criteria

get.summary: Gets the reservations that have changed since the given version.
get.description:
<para>When calling the method for the first time, a start version of 0 is suggested.  This will return changes since the end system has started tracking changes until the endVersion.</para>
<para>Each method call returns both a change list and an endVersion, which represents the version of the last item included in the response. The change list will only include items with a version higher than the provided startVersion.</para>
<para>For subsequent calls, use the endVersion from the previous response as the new startVersion to continue retrieving changes incrementally</para>
<para>Note that the method does not guarantee returning all changes up to the current moment. It is the caller’s responsibility to make additional calls to ensure all changes are retrieved.</para>
<para>Additionally, the method may collapse multiple changes to the same element into a single, most recent update. For example, if an element has undergone 50 modifications, only the latest change will be included in the results.</para>

parameters.name: startVersion
parameters.description:
The starting version for the search.  
            	<para>The initial call to this method should use a start version of 0.</para><para>Subsequent calls to the method should use the returned endVersion.</para>

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer Authorization header. The value should be "Bearer < bearer token >". The bearer token is obtained from the auth/token endpoint. The bearer token must be base64 encoded. Use the above form to request and populate OAuth Bearer Token and Client Id.

401.description: Unauthorized. This can result from a missing, expired or malformed Authorization header.

403.description: Forbidden. This can result from insufficient permissions to access a method.
